hooks.command: echo '📍 Branch:' && git branch --show-current && echo '' && echo '📝 Recent commits:' && git log --oneline -5 && echo '' && echo '📂 Uncommitted changes:' && git status --short | head -10 || true
if ! git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then echo '⚠️  You have uncommitted changes:' && git diff --name-only && git diff --cached --name-only; fi

git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q '\.kt$' && echo '' && echo '🧹 SIMPLICITY CHECK — Review before moving on:' && echo '  1. Can any class/wrapper be deleted and inlined?' && echo '  2. Using latest Android APIs, not deprecated patterns?' && echo '  3. Any unused imports, parameters, or properties?' && echo '  4. Any abstractions with only one implementation?' && echo '  5. Could a built-in Compose/Material component replace custom code?' || true

file_path=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file_path" == *local.properties* ]] || [[ "$file_path" == *google-services.json* ]] || [[ "$file_path" == *.keystore* ]]; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Cannot edit secrets/credentials"}' && exit 0; fi

file_path=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file_path" | grep -q '\.kt$'; then echo '🔍 Kotlin file edited — verify this matches the iOS implementation before moving on.'; fi
